title: Master Asynchronous Orchestration
description: Implement the Outbox Pattern to ensure atomic database updates and message emissions. Prevent the 'Ghost Message' problem in event-driven architectures through robust transaction management. Design resilient asynchronous workflows for distributed systems using reliable messaging patterns.
objectives: Implement the Outbox Pattern to ensure atomic database updates and message emissions.
Prevent the 'Ghost Message' problem in event-driven architectures through robust transaction management.
Design resilient asynchronous workflows for distributed systems using reliable messaging patterns.
